tracks.meaning: a wooden or metal implement used to hit a ball in baseball, cricket, or similar games
a nocturnal flying mammal with membranous wings, belonging to the order Chiroptera
to hit or strike something with force, typically using a bat or similar object
to take a turn at hitting in baseball or cricket
eyelashes or the act of blinking, as in 'without batting an eye'
a strip of wood or metal used to cover joints or reinforce structures
layers of cotton, wool, or synthetic fibers used as padding or insulation in quilts or clothing
short for battery, a device that provides electrical power
